raw_consumer_statement:
I have made over 14 calls trying to get this charged removed. I was immediately sent a text with the fraud alert when the charge was made in XX/XX/year>. I immediately responded to the text advising that the charge was not mine and called the number for the bank and spoke with an agent. The next month I received the charge on my statement and immediately called the bank. The charge was shown as a credit, however I later received a letter from the bank on XXXX advising me that the charge was validated and the charge reversed back to me. I called them several times again and they said they would look into it. 
The paperwork I received from the bank as proof of the charge XXXX XXXX  being delivered to a XXXX XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX to a master card number ending in XXXX. That is not even my credit card number. 

This needs to be taken care of and the bank has done nothing about it.
